scripts.db:apply:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply skiluxe-db --local && wrangler d1 execute skiluxe-db --local --file=migrations/0002_seed_apartments.sql && wrangler d1 execute skiluxe-db --local --file=migrations/0003_seed_seasons.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute skiluxe-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_seed_apartments.sql && wrangler d1 execute skiluxe-db --remote --file=migrations/0003_seed_seasons.sql
